description: Determines the specific effect for Life spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the specific effect for Life spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

entries.result: Detect the proximity of living things

resultTranslations.en: Detect the proximity of living things

entries.result: Conceal the signature of life from things that can detect life

resultTranslations.en: Conceal the signature of life from things that can detect life

entries.result: Enhance a living thing with life force, making them temporarily stronger, faster, etc.

resultTranslations.en: Enhance a living thing with life force, making them temporarily stronger, faster, etc.

entries.result: Heal light wounds and illnesses like cuts and the common cold

resultTranslations.en: Heal light wounds and illnesses like cuts and the common cold

entries.result: Give life to plants and make them instantly grow and thrive

resultTranslations.en: Give life to plants and make them instantly grow and thrive

entries.result: Sense what ails a living thing

resultTranslations.en: Sense what ails a living thing

entries.result: Hurt the undead by projecting radiant life force

resultTranslations.en: Hurt the undead by projecting radiant life force

entries.result: Heal serious wounds and diseases like broken bones and pneumonia

resultTranslations.en: Heal serious wounds and diseases like broken bones and pneumonia

entries.result: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-8 for this context

entries.result: Damage the living by restricting their life force

resultTranslations.en: Damage the living by restricting their life force

entries.result: Destroy lesser undead such as zombies by overwhelming them with life force

resultTranslations.en: Destroy lesser undead such as zombies by overwhelming them with life force

entries.result: Heal unhealable wounds and lethal diseases like regrowing a lost limb or removing cancer

resultTranslations.en: Heal unhealable wounds and lethal diseases like regrowing a lost limb or removing cancer

resultTranslations.en: Raise the dead

entries.result: Imbue a non-living thing with life and sentience, such as a book or sword
